title: Bull and Foxconn partner to scale Europe’s manufacturing capabilities for artificial intelligence infrastructures
description: Paris, France - 1 June, 2026 -Bull, a leader in advanced computing and AI, and Hon Hai Technology Group (Foxconn), the world’s largest electronics manufacturer and leading technology solutions provider, announce a strategic collaboration to manufacture AI and Cloud infrastructure, from Europe to the global market. The partnership will combine Bull’s leadership in AI systems design, deployment and go-to-market, with Foxconn’s global manufacturing scale and supply chain capabilities, to enable the delivery of AI infrastructure solutions, including computing systems and related components leveraging Bull’s factory in Angers (France) and Foxconn’s factories in Pardubice (Czech Republic).

title: No negative impact of AI visible yet on software companies' earnings: Report
description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) has not yet had a negative impact on the earnings performance of software-as-a-service (SaaS) companies, according to a report by CLSA.
content:
New Delhi [India], June 1 (ANI): Artificial Intelligence (AI) has not yet had a negative impact on the earnings performance of software-as-a-service (SaaS) companies, according to a report by CLSA.

title: Online resources on AI and cancer lack quality, need improvement
description: Online information about artificial intelligence (AI) and its impact on cancer research and treatment for both the patient and general-public audiences is limited, and the available webpages and videos are largely of low quality, difficult to read, and frequently omit risks of AI use, according to new research presented today at the at the 2026 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting (Abstract 9000) and led by researchers from the Abramson Cancer Center (ACC) of the University of Pennsylvania and Penn's Perelman School of Medicine.

title: Nvidia launches Windows laptop chip in consumer PC push
description: Nvidia unveiled a powerful laptop chip for Windows machines on Monday, staking its claim in the market for next-generation consumer PCs integrated with artificial intelligence.
content:

title: PhysicsWallah Aims to Grow Revenue by Over 30% This Fiscal, Leverage AI to Cut Costs
description: PhysicsWallah aims to grow revenue by more than 30% this fiscal and leverage artificial intelligence to streamline operations and lower costs.
content:
Edtech firm PhysicsWallah expects to grow revenue by over 30 per cent this fiscal and leverage artificial intelligence to reduce operational expenses, a senior company official said.

title: 'Destroy AI': Ronny Chieng's Harvard speech strikes a nerve with Gen Z graduates
description: At Harvard's Class Day, comedian Ronny Chieng delivered an unexpectedly serious warning about artificial intelligence. While acknowledging AI's scientific potential, he argued that overreliance on chatbots risks creating a generation that stops thinking for itself, turning his commencement speech into a passionate defence of creativity and human effort.
content:
Graduation speeches usually follow a familiar script: embrace change, seize opportunities and prepare for a future shaped by artificial intelligence.
Ronny Chieng had other ideas.

title: As the Pentagon pushes for battlefield AI, some military leaders urge caution
description: The Trump administration is pushing to unleash the power of artificial intelligence for the U.S. military while facing calls to put up guardrails around the rapidly developing technology from some companies

title: SoftBank overtakes Toyota as Japan's most valuable company
description: Fueled by its significant stake in AI powerhouse OpenAI, SoftBank Group has surged past Toyota to become Japan's most valuable company. The tech investor's market capitalization soared following founder Masayoshi Son's announcement of a massive 75-billion-euro investment in French AI infrastructure, underscoring the booming demand for artificial intelligence technology.

title: Meet Arvind Jain, Indian-origin CEO in US who thinks ‘AI can’t replace humans yet’
description: According to Arvind Jain, founder and CEO of Glean Technologies, artificial intelligence (AI) is still a long way from replacing human workers.
